name: meta
description: Meta plugin for the learn-yy-skills marketplace: four skills — plugin-dev (a prescriptive guide to building a great skills marketplace: repo layout, Claude + Codex dual manifests, version discipline, what makes a plugin/skill worth installing), skill-authoring (how to write, structure, and review Agent Skills that reliably trigger and stay lean, portable across Claude Code and Codex), marketplace-health (check that an installed marketplace is on the latest version and auto-updating, on either host), and enable-autoupdate (keep it current — Claude Code and Codex) — plus a SessionStart hook (Claude Code + Codex) that flags at session start only when the marketplace's auto-update is off. The same SKILL.md files back the Claude Code plugin.
